action.content: Compose song lyrics about a socio-economic problem. The song should be in English and in all lowercase letters.
action.label: context

action.content:
the concrete ceiling, painted white
where dreams used to be painted in
the rent is high, the food is gray
and the silence is the only way
we try to breathe through the air
that smells of dust and old despair
the bank account is a hollow shell
while the world outside is still in hell

i see the line where the rich and poor meet
a barrier built of glass and steel
one step forward, one step back
until the gap becomes a wall
a child plays with a toy that costs a fortune
while the parent waits for the phone to ring
for a job that doesn't exist anymore
in a city built on borrowed time

the coffee cup is empty, the screen is dark
a million voices screaming in the dark
but the silence is louder than the noise
as the lights go out and the power dies
we are all just numbers on a sheet
trying to survive the winter's cold
while the system keeps spinning round
with no one to stop the clock from turning

oh, look at the faces in the street
so many faces, so many tears
but the money is in the vault
and the vault is locked and sealed
we are the bricks, we are the mortar
holding up the house of our own heart
but the foundation is cracked and broken
and the rain is coming down on the ground
action.label: response
